greeting: Good morning, Faye! Today is an in-office day at Rooks Advertising (9 AM–5:30 PM). You have a packed CC evening: Jus' Poetic newsletter send + Celine hangout. 🚨 Instagram security alert needs a quick check before you head out — new login detected from an unfamiliar device. Clay Griffin accepted your scheduling link too!
overview:
Today: Thursday, April 2 — Rooks In-Office Day. You're at Rooks 9 AM–5:30 PM, so CC work is evening-only. Squeeze in: Jus' Poetic newsletter send (final deliverable), GBP post publish (Q2 Quick Launch), and LinkedIn article drop (Pricing Mistakes). Evening is blocked for Celine — non-negotiable.

Critical This Week: VMC site has live placeholder text on Community page. Friday (tomorrow!) is VMC sprint day — Surgery page arthroscopy removal, Community page partner descriptions, GP revisions, About/Team updates. These directly impact lakewoodranchvet.com. Don't let the week slip.

New alerts today: Instagram login from unfamiliar device (Mac OS X / Chrome / Parrish FL — verify it was you); Typeform subscription cancelled; Google Workspace invoice auto-charging; Clay Griffin accepted meeting invite. Chase payment failure still unresolved — check your Chase secure messages.
